page.title: Install blvm
page.lead: Pre-built packages for Linux and Windows. Each release ships with a SHA-256 checksum and a detached GPG signature. Verify before running.

packages.label: Debian / Ubuntu
packages.description: Ubuntu 22.04+, Debian 11+, and any dpkg-based distro.
packages.installCmd:
sudo dpkg -i blvm_0.1.0_amd64.deb
sudo apt-get install -f    # pull in any missing deps

packages.label: Fedora / RHEL
packages.description: Fedora 38+, RHEL 9, CentOS Stream 9, and RPM-based distros.
packages.installCmd:
sudo rpm -i blvm-0.1.0-1.x86_64.rpm
# or via dnf:
sudo dnf install ./blvm-0.1.0-1.x86_64.rpm

packages.label: Windows
packages.description: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit). Signed installer: blvm registers as a background service via the Windows Service Manager.
packages.installCmd:
# Run the installer, accept the UAC prompt, choose your data directory.
# blvm registers itself as a Windows service and starts automatically on boot.

managed.summaryHint: Umbrel & Docker · click to preview planned steps
managed.banner: These paths are not live yet. Use the packages above or build from source until Umbrel listing and Docker image publish.
managed.intro: Prefer a one-click install? blvm is planned as a managed package on Umbrel and as an official Docker image.

platforms.name: Umbrel
platforms.description: Available in the Umbrel App Store as "Bitcoin Commons". Runs on a Raspberry Pi or any Linux machine with a one-click node stack.
steps: Open your Umbrel dashboard and go to the App Store.
Search for "Bitcoin Commons" and click Install.
Wait for initial sync to complete; this may take several hours on first run.
Access node settings and RPC credentials from the app detail page.

platforms.name: Docker
platforms.description: Run blvm in a container on any platform that supports Docker or Podman. The official image is planned for Docker Hub as btccommons/blvm.
steps: Pull the image: docker pull btccommons/blvm:0.1.0
Create a persistent data volume: docker volume create blvm-data
Run the node: docker run -d --name blvm -v blvm-data:/data -p 8333:8333 -p 8332:8332 btccommons/blvm:0.1.0
